programs.title: Air Crash Investigation
programs.desc: Aircraft accident reconstruction.To recreate the events that took place just before the tragedy, the creators present the situations that preceded them.The program will also include comments from specialists.

programs.title: Drain the Oceans 2
programs.sub_title: In the footsteps of gold diggers

programs.title: Forbidden History 3
programs.sub_title: Following the Ark of the Covenant
programs.desc:
Jamie Theakston seeks out the facts behind famous legends, myths and popular conspiracy theories.Together with the program team, he tries to solve the biggest historical mysteries by comparing facts, looking for new evidence and talking to experts.In the third season, the creators of the series delve into the mystery of the biblical Ark of the Covenant and reveal the true identity of the Man in the Iron Mask.They also explore stories about famous vampires, looking for their prototypes among historical figures.They also explore conspiracy theories questioning Hitler's death in the Berlin bunker and analyze the history of Satanism
Jamie Theakston examines everything known about the loss of the Old Testament Ark of the Covenant and its potential locations.This decorated box, which symbolized the presence of Yahweh, was one of the main cultic utensils of the ancient Israelites.According to legends, the Ark of the Covenant was also a powerful weapon, able to wipe out large cities from the face of the earth.All known traces that could lead to this priceless item are gone.However, Jamie does not give up and sets out to look for her, among others.to Ethiopia.

programs.desc: Jamie Theakston seeks out the facts behind famous legends, myths and popular conspiracy theories.Together with the program team, he tries to solve the biggest historical mysteries by comparing facts, looking for new evidence and talking to experts.In the third season, the creators of the series delve into the mystery of the biblical Ark of the Covenant and reveal the true identity of the Man in the Iron Mask.They also explore stories about famous vampires, looking for their prototypes among historical figures.They also deal with conspiracy theories questioning Hitler's death in the Berlin bunker and analyze the history of Satanism.
